title: Fixes #11896: Upgrade elevenmusic to music_v2 + reference-audio conditioning
author: sharktide
pr_body_excerpt: Close #11896 - Upgrade elevenmusic to music_v2 + reference-audio conditioning

gist.headline: Dropping the v2 beat
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our ElevenLabs music integration to music_v2. You can now use reference audio to condition your generated tracks, giving you way more control over the final vibe.
gist.summary: Upgraded the ElevenLabs music integration to use the music_v2 model and added support for reference-audio conditioning in the audio generation endpoint.
gist.impact: Users can now generate higher-quality music and directly guide the style of the output by providing a reference audio track.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a DJ/producer using a retro mixing desk, feeding a 'reference' cassette tape into the machine to represent reference-audio conditioning. Monitor robot dancing with headphones.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, placing a retro cassette tape into a glowing lime green (#ecf874) mixing console. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head wears oversized headphones and dances nearby. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, placing a retro cassette tape into a glowing lime green (#ecf874) mixing console.
